strengths: Deep backend and distributed-systems experience including low-latency microservices handling millions of HTTP requests per second at Dunnhumby
Hands-on agentic AI and MCP tooling work at re:cinq, including contribution to agentic workflow frameworks
Broad polyglot and platform breadth (embedded, web, mobile, cloud) combined with event-driven architecture experience via GISCollective
concerns: No executive, VP, or engineering-management experience; entire career is individual-contributor or staff-level with no evidence of scaling or leading teams
AI and agentic experience is nascent (~1 year, current role only) with no demonstrated production multi-agent systems at commercial scale
No fintech credit, payments, or risk-infrastructure domain knowledge, and no experience operating in regulated or high-stakes financial environments

key_factors.factor: Early agentic AI and MCP infrastructure exposure

response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a technically capable staff-level engineer with genuine depth in distributed systems and an emerging interest in agentic AI tooling, but the role is an executive CTO position requiring a track record of building and scaling engineering organizations, operating production multi-agent systems under financial and regulatory constraints, and owning fintech credit or payments infrastructure — none of which is present in this resume. The gap between current seniority level and the mandate of the role is the central disqualifying factor.
